# Lavi Nigam

> Personal blog on AI, Agent Engineering, and building in public.

Author: Lavi Nigam — ML Engineer at Google, building AI Agents. Also at theagentguy.ai

## Content
- /posts/ — All blog posts
- /about/ — About the author
- /tags/ — Browse posts by topic
- /archives/ — Chronological archive

## Featured Series: Agent Engineering with ADK

A 3-part tutorial on building Agent Skills for Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK):

- /posts/adk-agent-skills-part1/ — Part 1: What Are Agent Skills? Progressive disclosure for ADK agents. Covers inline skills, project setup, and the SkillToolset pattern.
- /posts/adk-agent-skills-part2/ — Part 2: From Files to Ecosystems. File-based skills, external skill repos, and SkillToolset internals for multi-skill progressive disclosure.
- /posts/adk-agent-skills-part3/ — Part 3: Skills That Write Skills. Meta skills that generate new SKILL.md files on demand, creating self-extending ADK agents.

## Topics
AI, machine learning, agent engineering, ADK, Google Agent Development Kit, agent skills, progressive disclosure, software engineering, building in public
